title: OXALENEDIAMIDOXIME. PART I. ESTIMATION OF NICKEL.
author: R. CHATTERJEE
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Oxalenediamidoxime has been used as an analytical reagent for the estimation of nickel up to 0.006 g., and for its separation from zinc and manganese. Quantitative separation from cobalt has been found possible within narrow limits of concentrations of cobalt.
steps_raw: Oxalenediamidoxime has been used as an analytical reagent for the estimation of nickel up to 0.006 g., and for its separation from zinc and manganese. Quantitative separation from cobalt has been found possible within narrow limits of concentrations of cobalt.
